parameters.name: sfs_uid
parameters.description: HPFS file-system UID.

parameters.name: region
parameters.description: Region ID used to scope the request.

parameters.name: sfs_name
parameters.description: HPFS file-system name unique within the account and region.

parameters.name: region
parameters.description: Region ID used to scope the request.

parameters.name: client_token
parameters.description: Unique client token retained for 24 hours and used to make the order request idempotent.

parameters.name: region
parameters.description: Region ID used to scope the request.

parameters.name: project_id
parameters.description: Enterprise project ID; default is 0 for the default project.

parameters.name: sfs_type
parameters.description: HPFS storage type; only hpfs_perf is supported.

parameters.name: sfs_protocol
parameters.description: File-system protocol; only hpfs is supported.

parameters.name: on_demand
parameters.description: Whether the file system uses on-demand billing; default is true and currently only on-demand ordering is supported. Cycle type and count are required when false.

parameters.name: cycle_type
parameters.description: Subscription cycle type: year or month; required when on-demand billing is false.

parameters.name: cycle_count
parameters.description: Subscription cycle count; required when on-demand billing is false and limited to a maximum total term of three years.

parameters.name: sfs_name
parameters.description: HPFS file-system name unique within the account and region.

parameters.name: sfs_size
parameters.description: HPFS file-system capacity in GB, starting at 512 GB in 512 GB increments.

parameters.name: az_name
parameters.description: Availability-zone name; omit it only when the operation permits all zones or the region has a single zone.

parameters.name: cluster_name
parameters.description: HPFS cluster name; supported only in regions that allow explicit cluster selection.

parameters.name: baseline
parameters.description: Performance baseline in MB/s/TB, supported only by some regions.

parameters.name: vpc_id
parameters.description: VPC ID associated with the new file system; HPFS protocol orders do not validate this field.

parameters.name: subnet_id
parameters.description: Subnet ID associated with the new file system; HPFS protocol orders do not validate this field.

parameters.name: label_list
parameters.description: JSON array of label objects. Label updates use key, value, and BIND or UNBIND operation values; label queries use key and value.

parameters.name: order_num
parameters.description: Number of identically configured file systems to create, from 1 to the remaining quota and at most 20; default is 1.

examples: ctyun hpfs file-system create --sfs-type hpfs_perf --sfs-protocol hpfs --sfs-name hpfs-2023-0711-16092 --sfs-size 512 --label-list '[{"key":"123","value":"456"}]'

parameters.name: client_token
parameters.description: Unique client token retained for 24 hours and used to make the order request idempotent.

parameters.name: sfs_uid
parameters.description: HPFS file-system UID.

parameters.name: region
parameters.description: Region ID used to scope the request.

parameters.name: sfs_size
parameters.description: New HPFS file-system capacity in GB; expansion only, starting at 512 GB in 512 GB increments and subject to quota.

parameters.name: sfs_uid
parameters.description: HPFS file-system UID.

parameters.name: sfs_status
parameters.description: File-system status filter: creating, available, expired, or unusable.

parameters.name: sfs_protocol
parameters.description: File-system protocol; only hpfs is supported.

parameters.name: az_name
parameters.description: Availability-zone name; omit it only when the operation permits all zones or the region has a single zone.

parameters.name: project_id
parameters.description: Enterprise project ID; default is 0 for the default project.

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: Number of results per page, from 1 to 50; default is 10.

parameters.name: page_no
parameters.description: Page number, starting at 1; default is 1.

parameters.name: fuzzy_name
parameters.description: Partial HPFS file-system name used for fuzzy matching.

parameters.name: region
parameters.description: Region ID used to scope the request.

parameters.name: sfs_type
parameters.description: HPFS storage type; only hpfs_perf is supported.

parameters.name: az_name
parameters.description: Availability-zone name; omit it only when the operation permits all zones or the region has a single zone.

parameters.name: ebm_device_type
parameters.description: Bare-metal device flavour used to filter compatible HPFS clusters.

parameters.name: page_no
parameters.description: Page number, starting at 1; default is 1.

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: Number of results per page, from 1 to 50; default is 10.

examples: ctyun hpfs cluster list --region 81f7728662dd11ec810800155d307d5b --sfs-type hpfs_perf --az-name az1 --page-no 1 --page-size 10

parameters.name: dataflow_id
parameters.description: HPFS dataflow-policy ID.

parameters.name: region
parameters.description: Region ID used to scope the request.

parameters.name: sfs_uid
parameters.description: HPFS file-system UID.

parameters.name: sfs_directory
parameters.description: FILESET directory used by the dataflow policy. Equivalent spellings with or without leading or trailing / resolve to the same directory.

parameters.name: bucket_name
parameters.description: Name of an existing standard-storage object bucket used by the dataflow policy.

parameters.name: bucket_prefix
parameters.description: Optional object-bucket prefix used by the dataflow policy.

parameters.name: auto_import
parameters.description: Whether automatic import is enabled. Exactly one of automatic import and automatic export must be enabled; enabling both or neither is invalid. Import data type and trigger are required when true.

parameters.name: auto_export
parameters.description: Whether automatic export is enabled. Exactly one of automatic import and automatic export must be enabled; enabling both or neither is invalid. Export data type and trigger are required when true.

parameters.name: import_data_type
parameters.description: Import data type: data or metadata; required when automatic import is enabled.

parameters.name: export_data_type
parameters.description: Export data type; only data is supported and it is required when automatic export is enabled.

parameters.name: import_trigger
parameters.description: Automatic-import trigger; only new is supported and it is required when automatic import is enabled.

parameters.name: export_trigger
parameters.description: Automatic-export trigger: new for newly created data, or changed for newly created and modified data; required when automatic export is enabled.

parameters.name: dataflow_description
parameters.description: Dataflow-policy description containing at most 128 characters.

examples: ctyun hpfs dataflow create --sfs-uid a2d4b927-9511-5a9b-b1de-cfe55779c1ea --sfs-directory /test01 --bucket-name bucket-test --auto-import true --auto-export false --import-data-type metadata --import-trigger new

parameters.name: region
parameters.description: Region ID used to scope the request.

parameters.name: dataflow_id
parameters.description: HPFS dataflow-policy ID.

parameters.name: auto_sync
parameters.description: Whether automatic synchronisation is enabled for the dataflow policy.

parameters.name: dataflow_description
parameters.description: Dataflow-policy description containing at most 128 characters.

examples: ctyun hpfs dataflow update --region 81f7728662dd11ec810800155d307d5b --dataflow-id dataflow-j9Kn2B --auto-sync true --dataflow-description 'this is the test dataflow strategy'

parameters.name: protocol_spec
parameters.description: Protocol-service specification; only general is supported.

parameters.name: protocol_type
parameters.description: Protocol-service type; only nfs is supported.

parameters.name: vpc_id
parameters.description: VPC ID used by the protocol service.

parameters.name: subnet_id
parameters.description: Subnet ID for the protocol service; required in a 3.0 region and when VPCE creation is enabled in a 4.0 region.

parameters.name: is_vpce
parameters.description: Whether to create a VPC endpoint; default is false. This option applies only to 4.0 resource pools. Subnet ID is required when true.

parameters.name: ip_version
parameters.description: Endpoint IP version: 0 for IPv4, 1 for IPv6, or 2 for dual stack; default is 0 and the field applies only when VPCE creation is enabled. Pure IPv6 and dual-stack endpoint creation are currently unsupported.

parameters.name: protocol_description
parameters.description: Protocol-service description containing at most 128 characters.

examples: ctyun hpfs protocol-service create --sfs-uid b4ecae3e-e775-56a8-97e8-6d003df6c344 --protocol-spec general --protocol-type nfs --vpc-id vpc-4s38mc911b

parameters.name: fileset_path
parameters.description: Absolute FILESET path beginning and ending with /, with a maximum depth of three below the root.

parameters.name: capacity_quota
parameters.description: FILESET capacity quota in GiB, starting at 10 GiB in 1 GiB increments and limited by available file-system capacity.

parameters.name: file_count_quota
parameters.description: FILESET file-count quota, starting at 10,000 files in increments of 1,000 and limited by the available file count.

parameters.description: Updated FILESET file-count quota; it cannot be smaller than the used count and cannot exceed the available count plus the FILESET's current allocation.
